title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Dishis Designer Jewellery

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Dishis Designer Jewellery
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
